label: salt_2_jin
heating_cooling_orientation: opposed wallHeatFlux/enthalpy direction in thermal gate; Nu is positive diagnostic only
correlation_statement: Across admitted Salt2-4 evidence, backflow fraction and recirculation intensity decrease as Re rises, but all rows remain recirculating with Ri_median>1 and no non-recirculating anchor; Pr decreases while Ra/Gr rise, so onset cannot be separated by one nondimensional group today.
